issues.offending_span: indicating robust online travel agency sector performance
issues.explanation: C084 explicitly states 'Not all analysts are bullish on shares of the online travel agency,' which introduces uncertainty. The paragraph's language implies more certainty about sector performance than the evidence warrants.
issues.recommended_fix: Qualify the statement to acknowledge the mixed analyst sentiment, e.g., 'with some analysts issuing higher price targets despite mixed sentiment.'
